text: The way you always know how to make me laugh.
How you treat every animal like it is the most important thing in the world.
How you always make me feel at home.
Your thoughtfulness and kindness comes effortlessly.
The way your eyes light up when you talk about something you love.
How you remember the little things that matter to me.
The fact that you make me want to be a better person every single day.
The way you love.
How you look after me when I'm not well.
The sound of your laugh is one of the bestest in the world.
How you stand up for who and what you love.
The way you make every room feel warmer just by being in it.
Your creativity, the way your mind works is unlike anything in the world.
How patient you are, even when you have every right not to be.
The way you always know how to cheer me up.
How you give the best hugs, the kind that make everything feel better.
The way you care about things with your whole heart.
How you can make even the most boring day feel like an adventure.
The way you talk to animals like they understand you completely.
How strong you are, even when you do not feel it.
The way you make me feel seen.
The dimples on your cheeks when you smile.
The way you get lost in things you are passionate about.
How honest you are, even when it's hard to be.
How you can never make anyone or anything feel small or unimportant.
How you stim when you are happy or excited.
How you light up around people and things that you love.
You persevere despite how hard life can be.
The way you always show up for me, no matter what.
How you make me feel like the luckiest person alive.
The way you handle hard things with so much grace, more than you give yourself credit for.
How your smile can completely lift my spirits in a heartbeat.
The way you love our children like they are your whole world.
How you always make time for the things that matter.
The way you get excited about simple pleasures like a tasty dinner, being cosy in bed, or doing the food shop.
How you have grown so much and have never stopped growing.
The way you make me feel safe in a way no one else has.
How you are so funny without even trying.
The way you reach to hold my hand when we are out and about.
The way you do that big big smile that melts my heart.
The way you make even the hardest days feel manageable.
How you say you miss me after being asleep.
The way you put so much love into the things you do for others.
How you are yourself and don't pretend to be anything else.
The way you appreciate the little gestures as much as the big ones.
How you make me laugh every single day without fail.
The way you take care of our babies.
How empathetic you are.
The way you never make me feel judged.
How emotional with love you get for your little angel Marnie.
The way you smile at me when we are in public.
How you always try your best, even when things are difficult.
The way you make our place feel like a proper home.
How there is no end to your thoughtfullness.
The way you stand up for yourself.
How you bring out the best in me.
The way you love the autumn months and all the spooky things that come with.
How much you love to be cosy.
The way you take care of our little family.
How you are the first person I want to tell everything to.
The way you smell. Like Home.
How you were the first and only person to make me feel instantly comfortable to be around.
The way you get protective over the people and things you love.
How you are so much braver than you think you are.
The way you manage to find humour and make everything lighter.
How you continue to help shape me into a better me.
The way you commit to things when you set your mind to it.
How you make even the food shop feel like something worth doing.
The way you notice when I need something before I ask.
How you are the most genuine person I have ever known.
The way you get all nice and cosy.
How you are my international woman.
The way you make me feel proud to be with yours.
How you are the most naturally beautiful person in the world.
How you still manage to put up with my imperfections after all these years.
How you have the softest most precious hands.
The sweet way you speak to our children.
How you have the most gorgeous hair.
How you allow me the honour to dry your goddess hair.
How you have the most wonderful, warm, generous soul.
The way you look in the morning, stunningness incarnate.
How you always are up for stimming with me.
The way you giggle when you're feeling giddy.
How you calm me when I'm feeling overwhelmed or anxious.
The way you still give me butterflies after all this time.
How you do that little nose twitch that makes me laugh.
How you do a really good predator impression.
How you love so unconditionally.
The way you make me feel like everything is going to be okay.
How you are the best thing that has ever happened to me.
How your heart is filled with so much love.
How you make the future feel exciting because I know I'll always have you.
The way you are my soulmate.
How you are my best friend.
How you are my person.
How you have stood by me through everything.
The way you do your makeup like a pro.
How you always stun me by how you do your makeup.
The way every single day with you is better than the one before.
How I fall more in love with you every single day.
How I cannot imagine my life without you.
How you make being alive worth while.
How you are the kindest, most sweetest person I ever met.
How you are my only true reason for everything.
How you have the voice of an angel.
The way that you sing your favourite songs.
How much we long for eachother when we are apart.
How you are the most beautiful woman I have ever seen or ever will see.
How your eyes sparkle when you look at the ones you love.
The way the colour of your eyes stun me.
How your eyelashes look so pretty!
How you cuddle into me makes me feel so at oeace.
How your cheeks look when you smile, I just want to give them a big smooch.
How you have the most beautiful lips.
How you dress up when we go out on dates.
How you look so stunning in a dress.
How you look so 'slay boots the house down' in your docs or similar!
The way you make me so giddy when I see you dressed up for a date!
How cute you are!
How you are my reason for waking up in the morning!
